matches.match_rationale: Episodic, reactive AP processing with manual due-date tracking is a workflow automation opportunity.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An AP automation agent that monitors the invoice inbox, extracts due dates and discount windows, and generates a daily payment run recommendation.

matches.match_rationale: Many supplier invoices arrive as scanned PDFs or WhatsApp images. OCR converts these into structured AP records.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An invoice ingestion layer using OCR to parse scanned invoices into structured AP records with due dates and terms.

matches.match_rationale: Time series forecasting over historical payment patterns can produce a 30/60/90-day cash outflow forecast.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A cash flow forecasting model generating a rolling 90-day outflow projection as a weekly finance dashboard.

matches.match_rationale: Suppliers demanding payment to personal accounts and informal payment facilitators are fraud risks that anomaly detection can flag.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A payment anomaly detector flagging invoices where payee account differs from historical patterns or duplicate invoice numbers appear.
